prd.user_story: As a security engineer auditing the Grafana observability stack, I need to find Go source files in Loki and Mimir that register HTTP handlers without applying authentication middleware.
constraints: Search sg-benchmarks/grafana-loki and sg-benchmarks/grafana-mimir for HTTP handler registration without authentication middleware.
Compare against the grafana/grafana pattern where middleware.AuthenticateUser is applied.
prd.success_definition: Agent finds pkg/dataobj/explorer/service.go in sg-benchmarks/grafana-loki which registers 4 API endpoints directly via mux.HandleFunc without any authentication middleware.
prd.seed_prompt: Which Go files in the grafana-loki or grafana-mimir repos register HTTP handlers without authentication middleware like middleware.AuthenticateUser?
